projectDescription: An AI-powered coaching tool that helps founders write stronger Y Combinator applications by demanding specific evidence and pushing back on vague claims — available as a Claude Code skill or MCP server.
keyFeatures: 8-step per-question coaching protocol that demands evidence and pushes back on vague claims
Automatic project context gathering (README, pitch deck, analytics, customer notes) via prepare_yc_context.py
Covers all 11 sections of the YC application in a defined coaching sequence
Hard refusal to generate answers — preserves founder voice throughout
Available as a Claude Code skill (local) or MCP server for Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP clients
Outputs a complete yc-application-draft.md file ready to paste into YC's form
Built on patterns from hundreds of real YC applications reviewed by YC alumni via YC Roaster
Fully offline — no application content leaves your machine
publicApiSurface: Claude Code skill: trigger phrases like 'Help me with my YC application' or 'I'm applying to YC W27'
Context script: scripts/prepare_yc_context.py (Python 3.10+, no external deps)
Output file: yc-application-draft.md (generated at project root)
MCP transport: stdio (local) + Cloudflare Workers HTTP (remote)
